text.title: Mutation Testing Gate Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the per-PR mutation report the gate emits. Agent must satisfy this before posting a PR comment or failing the build.

forbidden.pattern: mutation_score reported across uncovered lines (denominator includes mutants on lines with zero test coverage)
equivalent-mutant count claimed without entries in mutation-equivalents.yml with reviewer + date
gate_verdict=fail issued during the 4-week stabilization window when gate_mode=observe
surviving_mutants list truncated to under 10 entries when the actual surviving count is higher — must paginate or link to full report
run_scope=full-repo on a per-PR run when --since / --paths-to-mutate is available for the chosen tool
repo-wide single mutation_score reported as the headline number — must be per-module

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cap surviving_mutants list at top-50 by file size impact when posting a PR comment; link to full JSON artifact for the rest.
Group surviving mutants by file path when more than 20 mutants share a single file (collapsed view).
Round mutation_score_on_covered_lines to one decimal place; two decimals only when comparing to the threshold and the delta is < 1 point.

list.item: tool field matches the binary actually run (no stale reports)
run_scope=diff on PR runs when the tool supports incremental mode
Every module in modules_evaluated has both threshold_break and threshold_low set
mutants_equivalent_logged matches the entries added to mutation-equivalents.yml this run
run_duration_seconds is recorded; if > 600s on a PR, suggest narrowing scope before next run
